evidence_summary: Establish the Lion's transition from a fearful observer to an ambitious leader through a high-stakes negotiation triggered by a shared threat. The scale of the tiger and the ancient forest must emphasize the gravity of the spider-monster threat.

A tiger explains that a giant spider-like monster is terrorizing the forest. The Lion seizes the opportunity, striking a deal with the animals: if he kills the beast, they will crown him King of the Forest.
Lion appearing fearful/cowardly amidst forest beasts.
Lion standing with bravado, claiming kingship.
Tiger describes the spider monster; Lion proposes a deal for kingship.
